item.name: NET-GET-NEG-NOT-FOUND — Get garbage id → NOT_FOUND (verbatim YC async-style)
NET-LST-CRUD-OK — List networks в folder → 200 + массив
NET-LST-VAL-FOLDER-REQUIRED — List без folderId → InvalidArgument (no cross-folder enum)
NET-LST-BVA-PAGESIZE-ZERO — List pageSize=0 → default applied (200, ≤50 items)
NET-LST-PAGE-TOKEN-GARBAGE — List с garbage page_token → InvalidArgument
